caption: A man with glasses and a grey, spiked wig sits in a studio setting, wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with various framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins, including shirts with "LEE" branding. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "PODCAST" under a stylized "STUDIO" text and a logo on the right that says "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions while appearing to speak. The overall scene remains static in terms of location and equipment, with only minor movements from the man as he talks into the microphone.
